---
title: "Ethics of Vegetarianism and Veganism"
date: 2026-06-13
date-modified: 2026-06-13
format:
  html:
    css: style.css
    page-layout: full
listing:
  - contents: data.yml
    type: table
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    table-hover: false
    fields: [title, author, year]
    field-display-names: 
      title: "Title"
      author: "Author"
      year: "Year"
    page-size: 999
    categories: false
---

References from Heumer's *Dialogues on Ethical Vegetarianism*:
